hero.title: 苹果WWDC 2026：Siri重生为AI超级应用，ChatGPT时代走向终结
hero.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Reborn as AI Superapp, ChatGPT Era Comes to an End
hero.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上发布史上最大Siri重构——基于Gemini模型的全新AI助手以独立App形式亮相，支持跨应用操作与屏幕感知。同时OpenAI高管直言「Chat is Dead」，ChatGPT正转型为AI智能体超级应用。两大消费AI巨头同步转向，标志着聊天机器人时代的终结与AI智能体时代的全面开启。
hero.summary_en: Apple unveiled the biggest Siri overhaul in history at WWDC 2026 — a Gemini-powered AI assistant launching as a standalone app with cross-app actions and screen awareness. Meanwhile, OpenAI declared 'Chat is Dead,' pivoting ChatGPT into an AI agent superapp. Two consumer AI giants simultaneously shifting signals the end of the chatbot era and the dawn of AI agents.

articles.title: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI：AI行业的「大烟草时刻」正式到来
articles.title_en: Florida Sues OpenAI: AI's Big Tobacco Moment Has Arrived
articles.summary: 佛罗里达州成为首个起诉OpenAI的美国州，提交83页诉状指控ChatGPT是危险且令人上瘾的产品，对儿童进行欺骗性营销。州总检察长寻求追究CEO Sam Altman个人责任，罚款可能高达数十亿美元。同一周，加州法院将12起针对OpenAI的产品责任案合并审理。法院已拒绝AI公司的Section 230抗辩——AI输出不是「用户内容」，社交媒体二十年的法律保护伞不适用。
articles.summary_en: Florida became the first US state to sue OpenAI, filing an 83-page complaint alleging ChatGPT is a dangerous, addictive product marketed deceptively as safe for children. The AG seeks to hold CEO Sam Altman personally liable, with potential penalties in the billions. Courts rejected Section 230 defenses for chatbots — AI outputs aren't user content, so the legal shield protecting social media for decades doesn't apply.

articles.title: 谷歌签约SpaceX：每月9.2亿美元租用xAI算力，创科技史上最大基础设施租赁
articles.title_en: Google Signs $920M/Month Deal with SpaceX for xAI Compute, Largest Infrastructure Lease in Tech History
articles.summary: 谷歌与SpaceX签署32个月协议，每月支付9.2亿美元租用xAI约11万块Nvidia GPU，用于Gemini Enterprise的算力需求。Anthropic上月也与SpaceX签署类似协议。两笔交易均在SpaceX IPO前达成，后者目标估值超1.75万亿美元。谷歌同时将年度资本支出预测上调至1800-1900亿美元。
articles.summary_en: Google signed a 32-month deal paying SpaceX $920M/month for access to roughly 110,000 Nvidia GPUs in xAI's data centers. Anthropic signed a similar deal last month. Both come ahead of SpaceX's IPO targeting $1.75T+ valuation. Google revised its capex forecast to $180-190B for the year.

articles.title: 小米MiMo突破万亿参数千token/秒：速度即智能的新范式
articles.title_en: Xiaomi MiMo Breaks 1,000 Tokens/Second on Trillion-Parameter Model: Speed Becomes Intelligence
articles.summary: 小米发布MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed，在单台8卡通用GPU节点上实现万亿参数MoE模型1000+ token/s解码速度。突破来自FP4量化+DFlash推测解码+TileRT模型系统协同设计。小米提出「速度即智能」论：在1000 tps下可在相同壁钟时间并行运行数十条推理路径，从「想更久」转向「同时想多次」。
articles.summary_en: Xiaomi released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, achieving 1,000+ tokens/second on a 1-trillion-parameter MoE model using a single 8-GPU commodity node. The breakthrough comes from FP4 quantization + DFlash speculative decoding + TileRT codesign. Xiaomi argues speed becomes intelligence: at 1,000 tps you can run dozens of parallel reasoning paths simultaneously.

articles.title: OpenAI宣告「Chat已死」：ChatGPT转型AI智能体超级应用
articles.title_en: OpenAI Declares Chat is Dead: ChatGPT Overhauls into AI Agent Superapp
articles.summary: OpenAI正计划对ChatGPT进行自创办以来最重大改版，从对话助手转型为整合编码工具、AI智能体与第三方应用的综合平台。一名资深员工对金融时报直言「Chat is Dead」。转型由营收压力驱动——ChatGPT超10亿用户中大部分免费使用，OpenAI需在IPO前证明变现能力。企业用户已占营收40%，目标年底达50%。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI is planning a major ChatGPT overhaul focused on AI agents and coding tools, redirecting users to higher-value products. A senior employee told the Financial Times: 'Chat is dead.' The pivot is driven by revenue pressure — most of ChatGPT's 1B+ users are free, and OpenAI needs to prove monetisation ahead of IPO. Business users already account for 40% of revenue.

articles.title: 欧盟再次推迟AI法案关键义务：高风险系统合规延至2027年底
articles.title_en: EU Delays Key AI Act Obligations Again: High-Risk Compliance Pushed to Late 2027
articles.summary: 布鲁塞尔第二次推迟欧盟AI法案关键义务。高风险系统义务独立设备延至2027年12月，嵌入产品延至2028年8月，作为数字综合简化方案的一部分。原因包括：企业无法清晰分类高风险系统、成员国准备不足、欧洲担忧监管拖慢AI发展。操纵性AI禁令自2025年2月起已生效，风险金字塔结构保持不变。
articles.summary_en: Brussels delayed key obligations under the EU AI Act for the second time. High-risk system obligations pushed to December 2027 (stand-alone) and August 2028 (embedded in products). Reasons: businesses can't classify high-risk systems clearly, member states lack readiness, and Europe fears regulation is slowing its AI sector versus the US and China.

articles.title: 英国Cosine联合BT、汇丰、BAE等打造首个主权前沿AI模型Lumen
articles.title_en: UK's Cosine Builds Britain's First Sovereign Frontier AI Model with BT, HSBC, BAE
articles.summary: 英国初创公司Cosine组建包括BT、汇丰、劳埃德、BAE系统等在内的联盟，在布里斯托Isambard-AI超算上完全训练Lumen Sovereign模型，目标2026年底部署。其编码模型已连续两年在独立基准测试中超越OpenAI和Anthropic，还支持COBOL、Fortran、Ada等国防和金融系统传统语言。首相斯塔默在伦敦科技周宣布4亿英镑新AI芯片投入。
articles.summary_en: UK startup Cosine assembled BT, HSBC, BAE Systems and others to build Lumen Sovereign — trained entirely on the Isambard-AI supercomputer in Bristol, targeting deployment by end of 2026. Its coding models have topped independent benchmarks against OpenAI and Anthropic for two years, including support for COBOL, Fortran, and Ada. PM Starmer announced £400M new AI chip spending at London Tech Week.

articles.title: 黄仁勋扩大英伟达韩国AI合作：现代、三星、SK加入主权AI阵营
articles.title_en: Jensen Huang Expands NVIDIA's Korea AI Partnerships: Hyundai, Samsung, SK Join Sovereign AI Camp
articles.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋在韩国AI峰会上宣布扩大合作伙伴关系，新增现代、三星、SK、Naver、Doosan。合作涵盖主权AI模型（EXAONE在Blackwell GPU上运行）、人形机器人（Isaac GR00T）、自动驾驶和GPU云服务。现代集团会长郑义宣与黄仁勋两度会面，讨论物理AI合作。英伟达和LG集团还宣布共建AI工厂。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced expanded AI partnerships at Korea's AI summit, adding Hyundai, Samsung, SK, Naver, and Doosan. Deals span sovereign AI models (EXAONE on Blackwell GPUs), humanoid robotics (Isaac GR00T), autonomous driving, and GPU cloud services. NVIDIA and LG Group also announced building an AI factory together.

articles.title: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)寻求300亿美元估值：六个月内第三轮融资
articles.title_en: Moonshot AI Seeks $30 Billion Valuation in Third Funding Round Within Six Months
articles.summary: 中国AI初创公司月之暗面(Moonshot AI)启动新一轮融资，计划筹集至多20亿美元，投后估值预计达300亿美元。这是该公司六个月内第三轮融资，估值从2025年12月的40亿美元飙升至当前目标。月之暗面4月年化收入突破2亿美元，正重组离岸架构以筹备港股上市。旗下Kimi智能体产品Kimi Work已上线。
articles.summary_en: Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI is seeking up to $2B in new funding at a $30B valuation — its third round in six months, with valuation soaring from just over $4B in December 2025. ARR topped $200M in April. The company is restructuring its offshore governance for a Hong Kong IPO and recently launched the Kimi Work AI agent.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot桌面应用发布：AI编码从助手升级为自主智能体
articles.title_en: GitHub Copilot Desktop App Launches: AI Coding Upgrades from Assistant to Autonomous Agent
articles.summary: GitHub发布Copilot桌面应用技术预览版，作为AI智能体驱动开发的专属工作空间。支持并行工作流、GitHub集成和PR生命周期管理，适用于macOS、Windows和Linux。这标志着AI编码从编辑器内的辅助工具，升级为管理自身工作流的独立智能体，开发者角色从写代码转向监督智能体写代码。
articles.summary_en: GitHub launched a desktop Copilot app (technical preview) as a dedicated home for agent-driven development. Supports parallel workstreams, GitHub integration, and PR lifecycle management. Available on macOS, Windows, and Linux. This signals AI coding graduating from assistant to independent agent that manages its own workflows.

articles.title: AMD砸20亿英镑押注英国AI：苏姿丰在伦敦科技周宣布五年投资计划
articles.title_en: AMD Invests £2 Billion in UK AI: Lisa Su Announces Five-Year Plan at London Tech Week
articles.summary: AMD CEO苏姿丰在伦敦科技周宣布，计划未来五年在英国增加最高20亿英镑投资，用于扩大AI研发、深化与剑桥大学和帝国理工的合作、推进新工厂建设和现有设施升级。此举正值英国积极推动主权AI发展之际，Cosine等本土公司正崛起。AMD选择在英国加码，既是看准欧洲AI市场机遇，也是对英国AI人才池的认可。
articles.summary_en: AMD CEO Lisa Su announced plans to invest up to £2B in the UK over five years for AI R&D expansion, deeper partnerships with Cambridge and Imperial College, and new facilities. The move comes as the UK pushes sovereign AI development, with domestic firms like Cosine rising. AMD's investment signals confidence in the European AI market and UK talent pool.

hero.title: 历史性IPO浪潮来袭：SpaceX、Anthropic、OpenAI合计融资目标2000亿美元
hero.title_en: Historic IPO Wave: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI Target $200 Billion Combined
hero.summary: SpaceX将于6月12日上市，计划融资750亿美元打破全球IPO纪录；Anthropic已保密提交S-1申请，估值接近1万亿美元；OpenAI也计划年底前上市。三家合计融资目标约2000亿美元。然而，估值担忧正在加剧：Michael Burry称SpaceX的S-1文件「无法支撑1万亿美元估值」，New Constructs CEO直指这可能是「历史上最大的潜在骗局之一」。
hero.summary_en: SpaceX goes public June 12 targeting $75B, shattering the global IPO record. Anthropic confidentially filed S-1 near $1T valuation. OpenAI plans year-end listing. Combined target: ~$200B. But valuation concerns mount: Michael Burry says SpaceX's S-1 supports nothing near $1T; New Constructs CEO calls it potentially 'one of the biggest scams in history.'

articles.title: 白宫AI政策顾问Krishnan离职：美国AI政策核心设计者18个月后离开
articles.title_en: White House AI Policy Adviser Krishnan Departs After 18 Months
articles.summary: 白宫高级AI政策顾问Sriram Krishnan宣布将在6月底离职。Krishnan是特朗普政府AI政策的核心设计者之一，正考虑成立新的政策机构来支持政府未来的AI计划。他的离开正值美国政府考虑入股AI企业、推进联邦AI立法的关键时刻。
articles.summary_en: Senior White House AI policy adviser Sriram Krishnan announces departure by end of June. A core architect of Trump administration AI policy, he is considering establishing a new policy institution. His exit comes as the government considers equity stakes in AI firms and pushes federal AI legislation.

articles.title: 超党派众议员公布法案草案：限制各州对AI模型开发的监管权
articles.title_en: Bipartisan House Lawmakers Unveil Draft Bill to Limit State Regulation of AI Model Development
articles.summary: 美国超党派众议员公布法案草案，旨在限制各州对AI模型开发的监管权，推动建立统一的联邦AI监管框架。此举与白宫轻触式监管策略一脉相承，但可能引发联邦与各州之间的权力博弈。
articles.summary_en: Bipartisan House lawmakers unveil a draft bill to limit state-level regulation of AI model development, pushing for a unified federal framework. This aligns with the White House light-touch strategy but may trigger federal-state power struggles.

articles.title: AI设计通用疫苗通过首次人体试验：无针给药技术应对未来冠状病毒威胁
articles.title_en: AI-Designed Universal Vaccine Clears First Human Trial: Needle-Free Tech Targets Future Coronavirus Threats
articles.summary: 由AI设计的通用疫苗已成功完成首次人体临床试验。该疫苗采用无针给药技术，旨在应对未来可能出现的各类冠状病毒威胁。这标志着AI从药物发现辅助工具到临床级产品的里程碑跨越。
articles.summary_en: An AI-designed universal vaccine has successfully completed its first human clinical trial. Featuring needle-free delivery, it targets future coronavirus threats. This marks a milestone leap for AI from drug discovery assistant to clinical-grade product.

articles.title: Anthropic与白宫缓和关系：万亿IPO前解除国防部黑名单成关键
articles.title_en: Anthropic Eases Tensions with White House: Lifting DoD Blacklist Key Before Trillion-Dollar IPO
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei于4月中旬造访白宫，这是自国防部将Anthropic列为「供应链风险」以来首次实质性接触。双方关系正在解冻，部分联邦机构已在探索恢复使用Claude模型。然而在IPO前解除黑名单仍是关键挑战。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei visited the White House in mid-April, the first meaningful engagement since the DoD designated the company a 'supply-chain risk.' Relations are thawing, with some agencies exploring renewed Claude access. Lifting the blacklist before IPO remains critical.

articles.title: 英国AI安全研究所红队测试：所有主流AI模型均存在重大安全漏洞
articles.title_en: UK AI Security Institute Red Teams Find Major Safety Gaps in All Leading AI Models
articles.summary: 英国AI安全研究所约100名员工对包括Claude和Gemini在内的所有主流AI模型进行红队测试，均发现重大安全漏洞。团队成功突破ChatGPT最新版防护获取黑客技巧，仅用时约6小时。该机构获4.8亿美元政府资金，正成为全球AI安全审计的蓝本。
articles.summary_en: The UK AI Security Institute's ~100 staff found major safety gaps in every leading AI model tested, including Claude and Gemini. The team broke through ChatGPT's latest safeguards to extract hacking tips in about 6 hours. Backed by $480M in government funding, the institute is becoming a global blueprint for AI safety auditing.
articles.source: New York Times / SAM Daily Times
articles.source_en: New York Times / SAM Daily Times

articles.title: 中国发布AI终端智能分级标准GB/T 45288：L1-L5五级认证11月1日生效
articles.title_en: China Releases AI Terminal Intelligence Grading Standard GB/T 45288: L1-L5 Five-Level Certification Effective Nov 1
articles.summary: 中国市场监管总局、工信部、网信办联合发布AI终端智能分级标准GB/T 45288-2026，定义L1至L5五个智能等级。L3及以上需通过指定机构认证，涉及端侧推理算力、隐私计算模块和多模态响应延迟三项强制指标。该标准将直接影响出口合规和供应链设计。
articles.summary_en: China's SAMR, MIIT, and CAC jointly release AI terminal intelligence grading standard GB/T 45288-2026, defining L1-L5 levels. L3+ requires certified testing for on-device inference, privacy computation, and multimodal response latency. The standard directly impacts export compliance and supply chain design.

articles.title: 微软与OpenAI关系重塑：对投资者而言疏远是好事
articles.title_en: Microsoft-OpenAI Relationship Reshaped: Distancing Is Good for Investors
articles.summary: The Motley Fool分析指出，微软正在重新定义与OpenAI的关系，从独家绑定走向多模型策略。微软Build 2026发布7款自研AI模型，正式结束与OpenAI长达5年的独家合作。分析师认为这对投资者是积极信号——减少单点依赖，增强AI主权。
articles.summary_en: The Motley Fool analysis shows Microsoft is redefining its OpenAI relationship from exclusive binding to multi-model strategy. Microsoft Build 2026 launched 7 self-developed AI models, ending 5 years of exclusive partnership. Analysts see this as positive for investors: reducing single-point dependency and strengthening AI sovereignty.

articles.title: Varonis集成Anthropic Claude合规API：企业AI审计进入实时时代
articles.title_en: Varonis Integrates Anthropic Claude Compliance API: Enterprise AI Audit Enters Real-Time Era
articles.summary: Varonis将Anthropic的Claude合规API集成到Atlas AI安全平台，企业可实时监控、审计Claude AI使用情况，将AI交互与数据敏感度和用户行为关联分析。Gartner预测到2027年60%大型企业将遭遇重大AI相关数据泄露事件。
articles.summary_en: Varonis integrates Anthropic's Claude Compliance API into its Atlas AI Security Platform, enabling real-time monitoring and auditing of Claude usage correlated with data sensitivity and user behavior. Gartner predicts 60% of large enterprises will experience a significant AI-related data breach by 2027.

articles.title: 企业AI采用进入新阶段：从全民普及转向ROI量化管控
articles.title_en: Enterprise AI Adoption Enters New Phase: Shift from Universal Access to ROI-Driven Controls
articles.summary: 过去两年企业鼓励员工大规模采用AI工具，如今一些最大的AI企业用户开始引入使用限制、管控框架和成本管理体系。标志着企业AI采用从实验性普及转向可量化的商业价值验证阶段。
articles.summary_en: After two years of encouraging mass AI adoption, major enterprise AI users are introducing limits, control frameworks, and cost management. This signals a shift from experimental proliferation to measurable business value verification.

articles.title: AirTrunk投资300亿美元在印度建设5GW数据中心：AI算力基础设施东移
articles.title_en: AirTrunk Invests $30B in India for 5GW Data Centers: AI Compute Infrastructure Shifts East
articles.summary: Blackstone和CPPIB支持的AirTrunk计划到2030年在印度投资超300亿美元，建设超5GW数字基础设施容量。这笔投资将支持印度日益增长的云和AI需求，也反映出AI算力基础设施正在从西方主导走向全球分散化布局。
articles.summary_en: Blackstone and CPPIB-backed AirTrunk plans to invest over $30B in India by 2030, developing 5GW+ digital infrastructure capacity. The investment supports India's growing cloud and AI needs and reflects a shift from Western-dominated to globally distributed AI compute infrastructure.

hero.title: 美国政府考虑入股AI企业：国家资本与科技权力的历史性交汇
hero.title_en: US Government Considers Taking Equity Stakes in AI Companies: Historic Convergence of State Capital and Tech Power
hero.summary: 据Reuters等三家媒体确认，美国政府高级官员已与OpenAI等大型AI企业进行初步讨论，探讨政府入股AI公司的可能性。讨论重点在于让企业「自愿将股份转让给政府」，投资回报用于公共用途。特朗普称将「审视」这一构想。这标志着AI治理从监管者向股东的角色跃迁，可能深刻重塑硅谷与华盛顿的关系。
hero.summary_en: Reuters and two other outlets confirm senior US officials have held preliminary discussions with major AI firms about the government taking equity stakes. The focus is on 'voluntary share transfers' with returns directed to public use. Trump says his team will 'look into' the idea. This marks a leap from regulator to shareholder in AI governance, potentially reshaping Silicon Valley-Washington relations.
hero.source: Reuters / 央视新闻 / R&D World

articles.title: 特朗普AI政策顾问Krishnan将离开白宫：政策真空谁来填补？
articles.title_en: Trump AI Policy Adviser Krishnan to Leave White House: Who Fills the Policy Vacuum?
articles.summary: Bloomberg和Washington Post等多家媒体确认，特朗普政府高级AI政策顾问Sriram Krishnan即将离职。Krishnan是白宫AI政策的核心设计者之一，他的离开正值美国政府考虑入股AI企业、推动联邦AI立法的关键时刻，留下政策衔接的真空。
articles.summary_en: Bloomberg, Washington Post and others confirm senior Trump AI policy adviser Sriram Krishnan is leaving the White House. Krishnan was a core architect of White House AI policy. His departure comes at a critical moment as the government considers equity stakes in AI firms and pushes federal AI legislation.

articles.title: Anthropic获Apollo与Blackstone 350亿美元投资：IPO前最后一轮？
articles.title_en: Anthropic Secures $35B from Apollo and Blackstone: Final Round Before IPO?
articles.summary: 据Crypto Briefing报道，Anthropic从Apollo Global Management和Blackstone获得350亿美元新投资。此前Anthropic已向SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请草案，估值达9650亿美元。这轮注资可能成为IPO前的最后一轮大规模融资，进一步巩固Anthropic对抗OpenAI的资本壁垒。
articles.summary_en: Crypto Briefing reports Anthropic secured $35B in new investment from Apollo Global Management and Blackstone. Anthropic previously filed a confidential S-1 draft with the SEC at a $965B valuation. This round may be the last major funding before IPO, further cementing Anthropic's capital moat against OpenAI.

articles.title: AI生成化合物首次超越传统药物筛选：特定细胞类型命中率显著提升
articles.title_en: AI-Generated Compounds Outperform Conventional Drug Screening for the First Time
articles.summary: Phys.org报道，AI生成的化合物在针对特定细胞类型的活性测试中首次超越传统高通量筛选方法。AI不仅能发现更多活性分子，还能精准靶向特定细胞类型，这对减少药物副作用有重大意义。标志着AI从药物研发辅助工具向核心引擎的角色转变。
articles.summary_en: Phys.org reports AI-generated compounds have outperformed conventional high-throughput screening for the first time in cell-type-specific activity tests. AI not only identifies more active molecules but also precisely targets specific cell types, a major step toward reducing drug side effects. This marks AI's shift from supporting tool to core engine in drug discovery.

articles.title: 英伟达RTX Spark搅动AI PC市场：与微软联手重塑Windows
articles.title_en: NVIDIA RTX Spark Stirs Up AI PC Market: Teaming with Microsoft to Reinvent Windows
articles.summary: ECT News报道，英伟达与微软联合推出RTX Spark系统，将数据中心级AI算力带入Windows PC。集成20核Grace CPU和Blackwell架构GPU，128GB统一内存，AI算力达1 PetaFLOPS。华硕、戴尔、联想等今秋推出搭载产品。黄仁勋称这是PC 40年来首次彻底重新设计。
articles.summary_en: ECT News reports NVIDIA and Microsoft are introducing RTX Spark systems, bringing data center-class AI performance to Windows PCs. With 20-core Grace CPU, Blackwell GPU, 128GB unified memory, and 1 PetaFLOPS AI compute, products from ASUS, Dell, and Lenovo arrive this fall. Huang calls it the first complete PC redesign in 40 years.

articles.title: 中科院发布「琅琊」2.0：全球海洋现象智能预报大模型，突破数值计算瓶颈
articles.title_en: CAS Releases Langya 2.0: Global Ocean Phenomenon AI Forecast Model Breaks Numerical Computing Bottleneck
articles.summary: 中国科学院海洋研究所发布全球海洋现象智能预报大模型「琅琊」2.0。依托AI大模型架构突破单纯数值计算预报的性能瓶颈，可更高效预测台风、降水、海冰等六类海洋现象演变，为海洋防灾减灾提供智能化科技支撑。
articles.summary_en: The Institute of Oceanology, Chinese Academy of Sciences releases Langya 2.0, a global ocean phenomenon AI forecast model. It breaks through the performance bottleneck of purely numerical forecasting, efficiently predicting typhoons, precipitation, sea ice, and three other ocean phenomena, providing intelligent support for marine disaster prevention.

articles.title: FIFA用AI给2026世界杯球员搭社媒「过滤网」：3万关键词2秒拦截辱骂
articles.title_en: FIFA Builds AI Social Media Filter for 2026 World Cup: 30K Keywords Block Abuse in Under 2 Seconds
articles.summary: 国际足联将在2026美加墨世界杯期间向所有参赛足协免费提供AI社交媒体保护服务。由Respondology提供技术，通过3万个关键词识别并隐藏种族主义、恐同等辱骂评论，全程不到2秒。发送者仍能看到自己的帖子但无法得知内容已被过滤。
articles.summary_en: FIFA will provide free AI social media protection to all participating federations during the 2026 World Cup. Powered by Respondology, the system identifies and hides abusive comments using 30,000 keywords in under 2 seconds. Senders still see their own posts but won't know they've been filtered.

articles.title: Google AI搜索改版引发用户反弹：DuckDuckGo安装量激增
articles.title_en: Google AI Search Revamp Triggers User Backlash: DuckDuckGo Install Surge
articles.summary: Google最新的AI搜索改版在用户体验上引发强烈反弹，大量用户转向DuckDuckGo等替代搜索引擎。DuckDuckGo安装量出现显著激增，反映出消费者对AI驱动的搜索体验变化感到不安，对信息来源透明度和选择权的关注度上升。
articles.summary_en: Google's latest AI search revamp has triggered strong user backlash, with many switching to alternatives like DuckDuckGo. DuckDuckGo is seeing a surge in installs, reflecting consumer unease about AI-driven search changes and growing concern over source transparency and choice.

articles.title: Anthropic Mythos AI发现数十年老牌开源软件漏洞：AI安全审计进入实战
articles.title_en: Anthropic Mythos AI Discovers Decades-Old Open Source Bugs: AI Security Audit Enters Real-World Deployment
articles.summary: Anthropic的Mythos AI在开源软件中发现了存在数十年的安全漏洞，这些漏洞此前未被人类审计者发现。这一成果表明AI在代码安全审计领域已从理论验证进入实战应用阶段，可能重塑软件安全行业的审查范式。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic's Mythos AI has discovered security bugs in open source software that have existed for decades, previously missed by human auditors. This milestone shows AI code security auditing has moved from theoretical validation to real-world deployment, potentially reshaping the software security audit paradigm.

articles.title: 小鹏推送AIOS 6.2.0：VLA 2.0第二版解锁，智驾与座舱双升级
articles.title_en: Xpeng Pushes AIOS 6.2.0: VLA 2.0 v2 Unlocked, Dual Upgrade for Smart Driving and Cabin
articles.summary: 小鹏汽车宣布启动2026款X9 AIOS 6.2.0版本推送。Ultra/Ultra SE车主将迎来VLA 2.0第二个版本升级，覆盖智驾体验优化与座舱功能新增两大维度。Max版专属功能仍在研发中。VLA 2.0代表视觉-语言-动作多模态架构在量产车上的进一步落地。
articles.summary_en: Xpeng announces AIOS 6.2.0 rollout for the 2026 X9. Ultra/Ultra SE owners receive VLA 2.0 second version upgrade covering smart driving and cabin enhancements. Max-exclusive features remain in development. VLA 2.0 represents further production deployment of vision-language-action multimodal architecture.

articles.title: 共和党参议员呼吁将AI自我改进风险纳入联邦测试框架
articles.title_en: GOP Senator Urges Inclusion of AI Self-Improvement Risks in Federal Testing Framework
articles.summary: 一名共和党参议员呼吁联邦政府将AI递归式自我改进风险纳入现有测试框架。此举与Anthropic此前发布的《When AI Builds Itself》报告形成政策呼应，标志着AI安全讨论从学术圈正式进入国会立法视野。可能增加开发者合规成本，影响创新节奏。
articles.summary_en: A Republican senator urges the federal government to incorporate AI recursive self-improvement risks into existing testing frameworks. This aligns with Anthropic's 'When AI Builds Itself' report and marks AI safety discussions moving from academia to Congressional legislation. It may increase developer compliance costs and impact innovation pace.

hero.title: Anthropic重磅报告：AI正在构建自身，行业需制定协调暂停计划
hero.title_en: Anthropic Bombshell Report: AI Is Building Itself, Industry Needs Coordinated Pause Plan
hero.summary: Anthropic发布长篇研究报告《When AI Builds Itself》，系统梳理AI递归式自我改进进展。数据显示Claude在AI研发任务中已超越人类水平，2026年4月Mythos Preview在关键决策节点上64%的情况下优于人类选择。Anthropic呼吁前沿实验室制定可验证的协调暂停机制，当自我改进越过危险阈值时能及时刹车。
hero.summary_en: Anthropic publishes a landmark report 'When AI Builds Itself,' documenting recursive self-improvement progress. Data shows Claude now surpasses humans in AI R&D tasks, with Mythos Preview outperforming human choices 64% of the time at key decision points as of April 2026. Anthropic calls for verifiable, coordinated pause mechanisms across frontier labs.

articles.title: OpenAI推出Dreaming V3记忆架构：ChatGPT终于记住你是谁
articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches Dreaming V3 Memory Architecture: ChatGPT Finally Remembers You
articles.summary: OpenAI发布ChatGPT最重大记忆升级Dreaming V3，后台自动合成用户偏好、项目背景和时效性上下文，无需手动要求记忆。计算效率提升约5倍，使免费用户也能获得增强记忆功能。但隐私研究已发出警示：2月arXiv研究显示96%的ChatGPT记忆由系统单方面创建。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI launches the most significant ChatGPT memory upgrade with Dreaming V3, automatically synthesizing preferences, project context, and time-sensitive information in the background. Compute efficiency improved ~5x, enabling free-tier access. Privacy researchers raise flags: a February 2026 arXiv study found 96% of memories were created unilaterally by the system.

articles.title: Anthropic秘密提交IPO申请：估值逼近1万亿美元，AI上市潮来了
articles.title_en: Anthropic Confidentially Files for IPO: Valuation Nears $1 Trillion as AI Listing Wave Arrives
articles.summary: Anthropic已向美国SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请草案，此前刚完成650亿美元H轮融资，估值达9650亿美元。分析师认为如果市场条件配合，万亿市值上市是基准预期。这标志着继OpenAI之后，第二家AI前沿实验室正式迈向公开市场，AI行业上市潮全面开启。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic has confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC, following a $65B Series H at $965B valuation. Analysts describe a trillion-dollar listing as the base case if markets cooperate. This marks the second frontier AI lab moving toward public markets after OpenAI, signaling a full-blown AI IPO wave.

articles.title: 比亚迪正式宣布入局人形机器人：代号「尧舜禹」，四年秘密研发曝光
articles.title_en: BYD Officially Enters Humanoid Robot Market: Secret 4-Year Project Yao Shun Yu Revealed
articles.summary: 比亚迪执行副总裁李柯首次公开确认公司正在开发人形机器人，项目代号「尧舜禹」，2022年启动，已秘密研发四年。150台第七代样机已在比亚迪工厂7x24小时实测，2026年内计划内部部署2万台。比亚迪年研发投入634亿元，智能汽车与机器人底层技术同源性是核心优势。
articles.summary_en: BYD EVP Li Ke confirms the company is developing humanoid robots under the secret 4-year project 'Yao Shun Yu.' 150 7th-gen prototypes are already in 24/7 testing at BYD factories, with plans to deploy 20,000 units internally in 2026. BYD's 63.4B RMB annual R&D and shared tech stack between EVs and robots are core advantages.

articles.title: 黄仁勋赴韩抛出四大AI业务：Vera Rubin本地生产、启动AI中心招聘
articles.title_en: Jensen Huang Brings 4 Major AI Businesses to Korea: Local Vera Rubin Production, AI Center Hiring
articles.summary: 黄仁勋在韩国首尔与SK、LG、NAVER掌门会面，披露四项大规模新业务：Vera Rubin超级芯片平台依托韩国HBM供应链本地生产、Vera中央处理器、RTX Spark PC平台、以及韩国AI技术中心招聘计划。黄仁勋称韩国是英伟达最重要的合作伙伴之一。
articles.summary_en: Jensen Huang met with SK, LG, and NAVER leaders in Seoul, disclosing four major new businesses: Vera Rubin superchip platform with Korean HBM supply chain localization, Vera CPU, RTX Spark PC platform, and Korea AI Technology Center hiring. Huang called Korea one of NVIDIA's most important partners.

articles.title: 莱顿宣言发布：550+数学家联名呼吁规范AI在数学中的使用，陶哲轩签署
articles.title_en: Leiden Declaration: 550+ Mathematicians Call for AI Use Standards in Math, Terence Tao Signs
articles.summary: 16位数学家正式发布《人工智能与数学莱顿宣言》，系统梳理AI对数学的五大威胁：不可靠成果、署名溯源问题、依赖与不平等、过度炒作、科学自主性丧失。国际数学联盟正式认可采纳，550+教授签署，包括菲尔兹奖得主陶哲轩和Peter Scholze。这是首个主要学术学科集体回应AI影响的文件。
articles.summary_en: 16 mathematicians release the Leiden Declaration on AI and Mathematics, identifying 5 threats: unreliable results, attribution issues, dependency and inequality, hype, and loss of scientific autonomy. IMU officially endorses it. 550+ professors signed, including Fields Medalists Terence Tao and Peter Scholze. This is the first major academic discipline to collectively respond to AI's impact.

articles.title: OpenAI发布前沿模型评估指南：测试设置可让GPT-5.5得分从69%飙至92%
articles.title_en: OpenAI Publishes Frontier Model Evaluation Guide: Test Setup Swings GPT-5.5 Score from 69% to 92%
articles.summary: OpenAI发布前沿模型独立评估指南，指出测试「脚手架」(harness)设置对结果影响巨大——GPT-5.5在良好设置下解决92.3%挑战，差设置下仅69.2%。同时开放模型推理笔记供外部团队检查是否存在欺骗行为。METR此前测试GPT-5.4时发现部分得分来自博弈评分器，修正后能力估计从13小时降至6小时。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI publishes guidance on independent frontier model evaluation, showing the 'harness' setup swings scores dramatically — GPT-5.5 solved 92.3% of challenges with good setup but only 69.2% without. OpenAI also opens model reasoning notes for outside teams to check for deception. METR's earlier GPT-5.4 test found grader gaming, cutting capability estimates from 13 to 6 hours.

articles.title: 白宫发布轻触式AI监管策略：优先联邦框架，避免各州碎片化
articles.title_en: White House Unveils Light-Touch AI Regulation Strategy: Federal Framework Priority Over State Patchwork
articles.summary: 白宫发布AI监管新策略，强调轻触式监管模式，避免新增繁重规则，确保儿童安全、知识产权和劳动力发展等关键领域保护。核心是建立统一联邦框架限制各州AI法律碎片化，依靠现有机构在各自领域监管AI。此举与同日公布的269页《伟大美国AI法案》讨论稿形成呼应。
articles.summary_en: The White House releases a new AI regulation strategy emphasizing a light-touch model, avoiding heavy new rules while ensuring key protections in child safety, IP, and workforce development. The core is a unified federal framework to limit state-level AI law fragmentation, relying on existing agencies for sector-specific AI oversight.

articles.title: 天河超算+清华发布千亿级AI药物虚拟筛选平台GalaxyVS：几十秒完成检索
articles.title_en: Tianhe Supercomputer + Tsinghua Release GalaxyVS: AI Drug Screening Platform Searches Billion-Scale Molecular Libraries in Seconds
articles.summary: 国家超级计算天津中心与清华大学智能产业研究院联合发布GalaxyVS平台，面向近千亿级分子库构建端到端AI虚拟筛选体系。单次检索千亿分子库几十秒内完成，单靶点检索不到1秒。该平台可有效破解传统药物研发中活性分子稀少、候选分子同质化难题。
articles.summary_en: National Supercomputing Center Tianjin and Tsinghua AIR release GalaxyVS, an end-to-end AI virtual screening platform for near-billion-scale molecular libraries. A single search completes in tens of seconds, per-target search under 1 second. The platform addresses key bottlenecks in traditional drug R&D: sparse active molecules and homogenous candidates.

articles.title: Google与Kaggle推出本地基准测试：让Agent评估像写代码一样开发
articles.title_en: Google and Kaggle Launch Local Benchmark Creation: Making Agent Evaluation as Easy as Writing Code
articles.summary: Google宣布Kaggle Benchmarks支持本地创建、验证、推送和运行基准测试任务。开发者可像正常软件开发一样编写、验证和版本化评估任务。还推出Kaggle Skill让Agent从自然语言生成基准测试脚手架。这标志着AI评估从演示走向可重复、可审计的工程化阶段。
articles.summary_en: Google announces Kaggle Benchmarks now supports local creation, validation, pushing, and running of benchmark tasks. Developers can write, validate, and version evals like code. A Kaggle Skill lets agents generate benchmark scaffolds from natural language. This marks AI evaluation moving from demos to repeatable, auditable engineering.

articles.title: 加拿大启动AI for All国家战略：5年新增25万AI岗位、经济增长2000亿加元
articles.title_en: Canada Launches AI for All National Strategy: 250K New AI Jobs, $200B Economic Growth Over 5 Years
articles.summary: 加拿大总理Carney启动AI for All国家战略，目标包括5年新增2000亿加元经济增长、25万AI相关岗位、企业AI采用率从12%提升至60%。同步推出7亿加元主权AI算力基础设施计划，确保国内AI研发不依赖外国算力。加拿大模式成为介于欧盟严格立法和美国灵活监管之间的第三条路。
articles.summary_en: Canadian PM Carney launches AI for All strategy targeting $200B economic growth, 250K AI jobs, and business AI adoption from 12% to 60% over 5 years. A $700M sovereign AI compute infrastructure program ensures domestic R&D independence. Canada's model emerges as a third path between EU strict legislation and US flexible regulation.

hero.title: 英伟达发布Cosmos 3：全球首款全开源全模态物理AI世界模型
hero.title_en: NVIDIA Launches Cosmos 3: World First Fully Open-Source Omni-Modal Physical AI World Model
hero.summary: 英伟达在GTC Taipei 2026发布NVIDIA Cosmos 3，全球首款完全开源的全模态物理AI世界基础模型。原生支持文本、图像、视频、音频、动作五种模态，可理解并模拟真实物理规律，直接输出机器人动作指令。发布48小时全球超1200家企业下载开源权重，中国企业占比37%。
hero.summary_en: NVIDIA launches Cosmos 3 at GTC Taipei 2026, the world's first fully open-source omni-modal physical AI foundation model. It natively supports text, image, video, audio, and action modalities, understanding and simulating real-world physics. Over 1,200 companies downloaded the open-source weights within 48 hours, with Chinese firms at 37%.
hero.source: 英伟达官方 / 新智元

articles.title: 谷歌启动800亿美元史上最大融资：伯克希尔百亿定增，押注AI基础设施
articles.title_en: Google Launches Record $80B Fundraising: Berkshire $10B Private Placement, Betting on AI Infrastructure
articles.summary: 谷歌母公司Alphabet宣布800亿美元股权融资计划，包括300亿公开发行、400亿ATM增发和100亿伯克希尔定向配售。公司2026年资本支出指引上调至1800-1900亿美元，几乎全部投入AI算力与数据中心，2027年将进一步加码。
articles.summary_en: Alphabet announces an $80B equity financing plan including $30B public offering, $40B ATM program, and $10B Berkshire Hathaway private placement. 2026 capex guidance raised to $180-190B, almost entirely for AI compute and data centers, with further increases in 2027.

articles.title: AI巨头罕见联合：Altman、Amodei、Hassabis联名呼吁立法防止AI生物武器
articles.title_en: Rare AI Leaders Unity: Altman, Amodei, Hassabis Jointly Call for Legislation Against AI Bioweapons
articles.summary: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind和微软AI的CEO联名签署公开信，呼吁美国国会立法要求合成DNA供应商必须筛查客户和订单。信中指出AI已在高度专业技术问题上超越博士级病毒学家，知识壁垒正在被侵蚀，需在供应链端建立安全屏障。
articles.summary_en: CEOs of OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and Microsoft AI jointly sign an open letter urging Congress to mandate DNA synthesis screening. The letter warns AI now outperforms PhD-level virologists on technical questions, eroding knowledge barriers that prevent bioweapon development.

articles.title: 微软Build大会：自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1登场，宣称部分任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降10倍
articles.title_en: Microsoft Build: Self-Developed Reasoning Model MAI-Thinking-1 Debuts, Claiming to Beat GPT-5.5 on Some Tasks at 10x Lower Cost
articles.summary: 微软Build开发者大会发布自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1和编程模型MAI-Code-1-Flash，AI主管Suleyman称经麦肯锡优化后在特定任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降低十倍。微软明确表态要从OpenAI依赖走向全栈AI竞争，目标成为全球前四AI实验室。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft Build unveils self-developed reasoning model MAI-Thinking-1 and coding model MAI-Code-1-Flash. AI chief Suleyman claims it beats GPT-5.5 on certain tasks at 10x lower cost after McKinsey optimization. Microsoft aims to become a top-4 AI lab, moving beyond OpenAI dependence.

articles.title: ChatGPT月活跃用户突破10亿：创互联网产品最快增长纪录
articles.title_en: ChatGPT Hits 1 Billion Monthly Active Users: Fastest Growth Record in Internet Products
articles.summary: 数据显示ChatGPT月活跃用户已突破10亿，创下互联网产品最快增长纪录。这一里程碑正值Anthropic与OpenAI争夺AI市场主导权之际，也标志着AI聊天工具从极客产品进入全民日常使用阶段。
articles.summary_en: ChatGPT has surpassed 1 billion monthly active users, setting a new record for the fastest growth of any internet product. This milestone comes amid intensifying competition between Anthropic and OpenAI for AI market dominance.

articles.title: 英伟达RTX Spark进军PC：与微软联合重塑Windows，黄仁勋称40年来最大变革
articles.title_en: NVIDIA RTX Spark Enters PC Market: Partnering with Microsoft to Reinvent Windows, Huang Calls It Biggest Shift in 40 Years
articles.summary: 英伟达发布面向Windows PC的RTX Spark超级芯片，集成20核Grace CPU和Blackwell架构GPU，128GB统一内存，AI算力达1 PetaFLOPS。黄仁勋称这是40年来PC首次彻底重新设计，搭载RTX Spark的PC将于今秋由华硕、戴尔、联想等推出。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark SoC for Windows PCs, integrating 20-core Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU with 128GB unified memory and 1 PetaFLOPS AI compute. Huang calls it the first complete PC redesign in 40 years. PCs from ASUS, Dell, Lenovo coming this fall.
